% fig_lec03_chart_overlap.tex — Two overlapping charts + transition map
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec03_charts.jl
%
% ψ_α : O_α → U_α ⊂ R²   vertical projection (u,v) coords.
% ψ_β : O_β → U_β ⊂ R²   vertical projection composed with R_{30°}.
% Transition map  ψ_β ∘ ψ_α^{-1} = R_{30°}  on ψ_α(O_α∩O_β).

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \pgfplotsset{
    colormap={cgbluetint}{rgb255(0cm)=(210,224,240) rgb255(1cm)=(112,156,200)},
    colormap={munselltint}{rgb255(0cm)=(216,232,224) rgb255(1cm)=(120,160,138)},
    colormap={birrenredtint}{rgb255(0cm)=(245,215,210) rgb255(1cm)=(196,80,60)},
  }

  % ── TOP: M with O_α and O_β ────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.28, shader=interp,
        colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};

    % O_α patch (no border)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.55, shader=interp,
        colormap name=cgbluetint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_Oalpha_patch.dat};

    % O_β patch (no border)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.55, shader=interp,
        colormap name=munselltint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_Obeta_patch.dat};

    % O_α ∩ O_β overlap patch (drawn on top)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.85, shader=interp,
        colormap name=birrenredtint, mesh/rows=14, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_intersect_patch_M.dat};

    % Shared point p
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.8pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_M.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
        at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue]
        at (axis cs:-0.35,0.9,0.75) {$O_\alpha$};
    \node[font=\small, text=munsell]
        at (axis cs:2.5,-0.55,0.55) {$O_\beta$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=birrenred]
        at (axis cs:0.95,-0.9,0.4) {$O_\alpha\cap O_\beta$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black]
        at (axis cs:1.0,-0.1,0.32) {$p$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── BOTTOM LEFT: U_α ⊂ R² ─────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Ualpha,
      at={($(M.south)+(-3.4cm,-1.0cm)$)}, anchor=north,
      width=4.6cm, height=4.6cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.8,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[fill=cgblue!15, draw=none, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_Ualpha_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[fill=birrenred!45, draw=none, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_intersect_Ualpha.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_alpha.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange]
        at (axis cs:2.4,1.6) {$\Rn{2}$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue]
        at (axis cs:0.0,0.9) {$U_\alpha$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north]
        at (axis cs:0.95,-0.14) {$\psi_\alpha(p)$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── BOTTOM RIGHT: U_β ⊂ R² ────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Ubeta,
      at={($(M.south)+(3.4cm,-1.0cm)$)}, anchor=north,
      width=4.6cm, height=4.6cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.8,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[fill=munsell!18, draw=none, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_Ubeta_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[fill=birrenred!45, draw=none, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_intersect_Ubeta.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_beta.dat};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange]
        at (axis cs:2.4,1.6) {$\Rn{2}$};
    \node[font=\small, text=munsell]
        at (axis cs:-0.4,1.25) {$U_\beta$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
        at (axis cs:0.88,0.38) {$\psi_\beta(p)$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── Arrows ψ_α (down-left) and ψ_β (down-right) ───────────
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, cgblue]
    ($(M.south)+(-0.8,-0.1)$) to[out=-100,in=80]
    ($(Ualpha.north)+(0,0.1)$)
    node[midway, left, font=\small, text=cgblue, xshift=-2pt]{$\psi_\alpha$};

  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, munsell]
    ($(M.south)+(0.8,-0.1)$) to[out=-80,in=100]
    ($(Ubeta.north)+(0,0.1)$)
    node[midway, right, font=\small, text=munsell, xshift=2pt]{$\psi_\beta$};

  % ── Transition map ψ_β ∘ ψ_α⁻¹ between the two R² panels ──
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=6pt,width=3.5pt]}, spacecadet]
    ($(Ualpha.east)+(0.05,0)$) -- ($(Ubeta.west)+(-0.05,0)$)
    node[midway, below=1pt, font=\scriptsize, text=spacecadet]
      {$\psi_\beta\circ\psi_\alpha^{-1}$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
